data.title: Cambridge Acquisition Corp. Announces the Separate Trading of its Class A Ordinary Shares and Warrants, Commencing March 30, 2026
data.description: On March 27, 2026, Cambridge Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: CAQUU) announced that starting March 30, 2026, investors who purchased units in the Company’s initial public offering can choose to trade the Company’s Class A ordinary shares and warrants separately. Following separation, only whole warrants will be traded, with no fractional warrants issued. The separated Class A ordinary shares will trade as "CAQ" and warrants as "CAQUW" on the Nasdaq Global Market. Units that remain unseparated will keep trading as "CAQUU" on the Nasdaq Global Market.

data.title: Paxos introduces $1M bug bounty initiative on Cantina platform for PYUSD, PAXG, USDG contracts to enhance security measures.
data.description: In a recent move, Paxos has introduced a bug bounty of $1 million on their Cantina platform. This initiative encompasses all significant stablecoin and gold token contracts, along with the Web2 infrastructure. This decision reflects their heightened focus on security measures within the platform.

data.title: Knight Therapeutics Inc. ranks on The Globe and Mail’s second annual Canada’s Top Growing Women-Led Companies and seventh annual Women Lead Here benchmark of executive gender diversity
data.description: In Montreal on March 27, 2026, Knight Therapeutics Inc. (TSX: GUD) disclosed its recognition on two of The Globe and Mail’s Report on Business magazine’s 2026 national benchmarks. The Company expressed delight at the acknowledgment.

data.title: Investors are growing impatient with the Iran conflict as the S&P 500 faces its 5th consecutive week of losses in 4 years.
data.description: The S&P 500 is heading towards its fifth consecutive week of decline, marking its most severe weekly losing streak in approximately four years.
